chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 5396 of 2025 [Ambreen Ahmed Sadiq vs. FOP & others] Petitioner: Ambreen Ahmed Sadiq wife of Muhammad Sadiq through Mr. Ghulam Umar, Advocate. Respondents 1-4: Federation of Pakistan and others through Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. Date of hearing: 17-11-2025 Date of decision: 17-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – Pursuant to order dated 10-11-2025, counsel for the Petitioner files copy of order dated 03-11-2025 passed by the Commissioner (Appeal-V) whereby stay was granted to the Petitioner up till 13-11-2025. Counsel is not aware whether the stay was extended or not. Since a stay was granted by the Commissioner (Appeals) and it is not being contended that same does not continue, the petition becomes infructuous. Disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
